description: Plugin-wide guardrails. [recoup-catalog-review-deal] PreToolUse blocks writes into deals/{deal-id}/source/ (immutable evidence). [recoup-content-*] SessionStart advises on missing credentials (RECOUP_API_KEY) and tools (ffmpeg) without blocking startup. NOTE: the Stop completion/analyze gates are no longer plugin-wide — they live in each owning skill's SKILL.md frontmatter so Claude Code scopes them to that skill's lifecycle and they only fire when the skill is active: recoup-catalog-review-deal (deal completion + mid-workflow dashboard gate), recoup-content-make-video / make-graphics / asset-pack / reactive-post (analyze gate), and recoup-release-plan-rollout (release completion gate). This stops the gates from firing cross-domain on every Stop.
